flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dallas Christian College fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (263 → 224).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dallas Christian College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.2k → $21.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dallas Christian College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.2k → $21.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dallas Christian College rose 185% between 2021 and 2024 (8.8% → 25.0%).
